'''鈭歳-z-r-th''' ('''karazrethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dandruff|dandruff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-z-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dandruff|dandruff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-z-r-th
|-
! Lemma
| karazrethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirazrethoko|thirazrethoko]] || [[word:jirazrethoko|jirazrethoko]] || [[word:shirazrethoko|shirazrethoko]] || [[word:kirazrethoko|kirazrethoko]]
